title: Ktriss
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Pet |image=[[File:Ktriss.jpg]] |name=Ktriss |homeworld=[[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]][[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Hssiss]][[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= |owners=[[Bogga|Great Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' }} {{Quote|FSSNNARRLL|The growl of Ktriss|translated=1|audio=Ktriss-Snarl.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]]}} '''Ktriss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hssiss]] [[dragon]] and the pet of [[Bogga|Great Bogga]], the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] of the [[Stenness Node|Stenness]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. Ktriss served as the Hutt's executioner and was often seen sitting at her master's side. A creature from [[Lake Natth]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] of the [[Stenness Node]], Ktriss had the primal [[Force power/Legends|ability]], like all those of her kind, to manipulate the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. In [[3999 BBY]], Ktriss demonstrated her [[Death/Legends|killing]] abilities for Great Bogga, in his court on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Vo Dasha]]. [[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]] and [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|his gang]] were brought before the Hutt for crimes committed against him. When Stonebone rejected Bogga's initial offer to make recompense, Ktriss was unleashed upon one of Stonebone's crewmates, [[Roko]], and devoured him in the company of his peers. ==Biography== ===Hutt familiar=== {{Quote|…Oh, I collected her from a curious lake on a nearby planet. She's my little ''pet''.''"
"''She ain't so little.''"
"''Indeed.|Great Bogga and Gudb, speaking of Ktriss|audio=BoggaAndGudb-Ktriss.flac|}} [[File:KtrissBogga-TotJ4.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Ktriss, in the company of her Hutt master]] Ktriss was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hssiss]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[dragon]] native to [[Lake Natth]] on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]], of the [[Stenness Node]]. The creatures of that lake were suffused with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]—the result of a [[Thon|powerful]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] trapping the planet's darkness there.''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' As such, Ktriss was able to subtly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|manipulate]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], using its [[Force power/Legends|power]] to [[Mind trick/Legends|confuse the minds]] of her prey. While still young, Ktriss was happened upon by a traveling [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] known as [[Bogga|Great Bogga]], who was the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] of the [[Stenness Node|Stenness]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]], where Ambria was situated. Bogga was intrigued by the young Hssiss and her species and captured several dragons to take off-world. All were placed on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and sold to colleagues and [[darksider]]s alike—all save Ktriss, whom the Hutt claimed as his own. Ktriss was taken to his stronghold on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Vo Dasha]], where she acted as the Hutt's personal security enforcer. As [[Time/Legends|time]] progressed, Ktriss grew considerably in size and ferocity, becoming an intimidating presence at the side of Great Bogga. In [[3999 BBY]], several members of [[Bogga's enforcer gang]] failed to steal a cache of precious [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] from a [[Sunrider family|family]] of travelers moving through the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]]. Ktriss was present when only the gang's leader, [[Gudb]], returned in shame, and the sight of him made her drool. Under penalty of Ktriss' wrath, Gudb was threatened into pursuing the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]]' owners to Ambria, the dragon's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Leaving Ktriss behind, Bogga accompanied his minions but ultimately returned to Vo Dasha empty-handed and defeated by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] who resided there. ===Roko's demise=== {{Quote|Unchain one of his crew…''Ktriss'' wants to show Finhead Stonebone ''why'' he must obey Great Bogga!|Bogga the Hutt|}} [[File:KtrissAttacks.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Ktriss prepares to devour Roko.]] Around that same time, Bogga's enforcer gang apprehended [[Ore/Legends|ore]] [[Thief/Legends|thieves]] for committing acts of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] against several of the Hutt's allies. Ktriss lay beside her master as pirate [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Finhead Stonebone]], the leader of the gang, was brought before them. As atonement for Stonebone's crimes, Bogga ordered the pirate to go to Ambria and retrieve the Adegan crystals from the Jedi who had previously beaten the Hutt and his minions. Stonebone, however, refused to involve himself with any act that called for raising arms against Knights of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and remained indignant before the Hutt. Appalled by Stonebone's defiance, the Hutt decided to demonstrate for the pirate the consequences of disobeying Great Bogga. Ktriss was called into action and let loose upon Stonebone's first crewmate, a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] named [[Roko]]. Using the dark side of the Force to temporarily cloud the pirate's mind, Ktriss rendered Roko immobile as she fell upon him, much to the horror of Stonebone and the rest of his gang. Ktriss consumed all of her victim, leaving only a [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] mess where Roko had once stood. The sight of his comrade's [[Death/Legends|death]] at the mercy of Ktriss was enough to compel Stonebone into service, much to the satisfaction of Great Bogga the Hutt. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I believe this dragon could swallow you in one ''gulp'', Gudb!|Bogga|audio=Bogga-Ktriss.flac|}} [[File:Ktriss1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Ktriss, poised for action]] Ktriss was a [[Color/Legends|green]]-scaled quadruped, with black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; a long, massive tail; and spiked protrusions that lined her back in two rows. She was of considerable stature while on all fours, and when she reared up on hind [[Limb/Legends|legs]], Ktriss stood taller than an adult humanoid of average height. She also had long, sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and massive talons. She readily responded to the instructions of her master, Great Bogga, who believed Ktriss to be capable of even devouring his lead enforcer, Gudb, in one bite. Ktriss indeed demonstrated hunger for Gudb, gnashing her teeth and salivating heavily while the diminutive [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] was in her presence. Gudb, however, believed that his own pet [[Gorm-worm/Legends|gorm-worm]], [[Skritch]], was more than capable of dispatching Ktriss. The dragon was loyal to her master and frequently accompanied him. Fear of Ktriss' abilities was enough for Captain Stonebone to reconsider the offer that Bogga presented to him. ==Powers and abilities== Ktriss used her large teeth and claws to devour her prey. She was capable of bringing down adult humanoids, evidenced by her overpowering of the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] pirate Roko. When Bogga ordered Ktriss to demonstrate her ferocity, the Hssiss obliged by immediately attacking Roko and tearing him to shreds in the presence of his mates. Ktriss was also Force-sensitive and used the power of the dark side when hunting to render her victim temporarily confused, making it easier for her to subdue them. ==Behind the scenes== Ktriss first appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi 4|''fourth issue'']] of [[Tom Veitch]]'s [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (miniseries)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] sub-series story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series. Ktriss is also featured in the [[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''audio rendition'']] by [[John Whitman]], based on Veitch's script. Additional details of her backstory were later established in [[2001]]'s ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'', a supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ktriss}} *{{GalaxyCite|2|The Saga According to Dave Dorman}} {{Po}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{InsiderCite|27|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 2}} *{{InsiderCite|28|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 3}} *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' *{{FactFile|140|HUT 15-18|The Hutts}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] {{Po}} *{{InsiderCite|151|Authors of the Expanded Universe|Authors of the Expanded Universe: More ''Tales of the Jedi''}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ktriss }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Members of Bogga's gang]] [[Category:Named pets]]
